title: DSIT cyber security newsletter - December 2025
body: "The monthly Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) cyber security newsletter details the latest announcements, events and projects for people interested in the field of cyber security. This month’s edition includes:   Cyber Security and Resilience Bill introduced to Parliament New research highlights significant cost of cyber attacks to the economy Cyber Essentials scheme growing at a record rate New figures show increasing cyber security employment, while high demand remains Respond to our surveys on software security and AI security.   You can sign up to receive the newsletter each month directly via email.  To ensure you receive the newsletter in your inbox please mark cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk as one of your contacts.  If you have any questions please email cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk.  Further editions of the newsletter can be found on the cyber security newsletter collection page.  "
